form.formComment: Most recently 12th of 16 at Saint-Cloud on April 3 over 2000m, on a slow track; 20 len behind Lelio carrying 58.5kg at $14. The race before that raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 16 at Cagnes-sur-Mer on February 2 over 2150m, 10 len behind D'orsay with 59kg at $13. Well placed in this line-up and can improve.

form.formComment: Chasing a hat-trick. Last start won by 1.5 len at Marseille Vivaux March 22 over 2600m defeating Ben De Diane carrying 59.5kg at $3.90. The race before that won by 1.5 len at Marseille Vivaux March 9 over 2600m defeating Dragon Love with 60kg at $5.40. In great form and should be right in the thick of things again.
